title.en: Not too short, please! (At the Hair Salon)
title.ko: 너무 짧지 않게 조금만 잘라주세요! (미용실에서 요청하기)

description.en: Worried about getting too much cut off? Learn the magic phrase "너무 짧지 않게 조금만 잘라주세요" to keep your length while looking neat.
description.ko: 미용실에서 머리를 너무 많이 자를까 봐 걱정될 때! 원하는 길이를 정확하게 지키면서 정중하게 다듬어달라고 요청하는 리액션을 배워봅니다.

tags: Situation. Life. Hair Salon. Request. Style. Length. Season 2

content.speaker: John
content.emotion: 거울을 보며 아주 신중한 목소리로 바로 시작
content.text: Mina, I really need a haircut, but I have a huge fear of hair salons.

content.speaker: John
content.text: I'm always afraid they'll cut too much and I'll end up with a buzz cut! How can I tell them to be extra careful with the length?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그 마음 정말 이해해요! 한국 미용실에서도 그럴 땐 처음부터 확실하게 리액션하는 게 좋아요.
content.translation: Ah, I really understand that feeling! In a Korean hair salon, it's best to react clearly from the beginning.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: "많이 자르지 말라" 고 하는 대신 이 문장을 꼭 써보세요.
content.translation: Instead of saying "Don't cut a lot," make sure to use this sentence.

content.speaker: John
content.text: What is it? I need to memorize this right now!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 바로..., "너무 짧지 않게 조금만 잘라주세요" 라고 말하는거예요.
content.translation: It is exactly saying, "Please cut it just a little bit so it isn't too short."

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 오늘은 머리 길이를 사수하면서 깔끔하게 변신하는 리액션들을 배워볼게요!
content.translation: Today, we'll learn reactions to transform neatly while protecting your hair length!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 너무 짧지 않게 조금만 잘라주세요.

content.speaker: John
content.text: So this means "Don't make it too short, just cut a little bit," right?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요! "너무 짧지 않게" 라고 먼저 선을 긋는 게 포인트예요.
content.translation: Right! The point is to set a limit first by saying "Not too short."

insight.title: 너무 짧지 않게 조금만 잘라주세요
insight.description: 'Don't cut it too short, just a little'
insight.usage_tip: 너무(Too) + 짧지 않게(Not to be short) + 조금만(Just a little) + 잘라주세요(Please cut). This is a very safe and polite request.

content.speaker: John
content.text: What if I want to be even more conservative and just want to tidy up the ends?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그럴 땐..., "다듬어만 주세요" 라고 말해보세요.
content.translation: In that case, try saying "다듬어만 주세요."

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: "길이는 그대로 두고 지저분한 것만 정리해달라" 는 뜻이거든요.
content.translation: It means "Leave the length as it is and just tidy up the messy parts."

insight.title: 다듬어만 주세요
insight.usage_tip: 다듬다(To trim) + 어만(Just only) + 주세요(Please give). Adding '만' emphasizes that you don't want any change in the actual style or length.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay, let's jump in. I'm sitting in the chair, and the stylist is holding the scissors. I'm a bit nervous!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 손님 오늘 어떻게 해드릴까요?
content.translation: Sir, how would you like your hair done today?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 길이는 유지하고 싶어서요. 너무 짧지 않게 조금만 잘라주세요.
content.translation: I want to keep the length. Please cut it just a little bit so it's not too short.

insight.title: 너무 짧지 않게
insight.usage_tip: By saying this first, you give the stylist a clear warning about your preference.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 길이는 거의 그대로 두고 정리만 해드릴까요?
content.translation: Ah, shall I leave the length almost as it is and just tidy it up?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 네! 그냥 전체적으로 다듬어만 주세요. 특히 앞머리는 정말 조금만 잘라주세요.
content.translation: Yes! Just give it a trim all over. Especially the bangs, please cut them really just a little bit.

insight.title: 다듬어만 주세요
insight.usage_tip: Repeating your request with different words ensures there's no misunderstanding.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 걱정 마세요. 딱 예쁜 정도로만 정리해 드릴게요! 잠시만 기다려 주세요.
content.translation: Don't worry. I'll tidy it up just to the right extent! Please wait a moment.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Phew! I survived. My hair is still there, and it looks so much neater!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 한국 미용실에서는 이렇게 내가 원하는 선을 명확하게 리액션하는 게 실패하지 않는 비결이랍니다.
content.translation: Right. In a Korean hair salon, reacting clearly about the 'limit' you want is the secret to not failing.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "hair length safety" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 너무 짧지 않게 조금만 잘라주세요!
content.translation: Don't cut it too short, just a little!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 전체적으로 다듬어만 주세요!
content.translation: Please just give it a trim all over!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 상한 부분만 잘라주세요!
content.translation: Please just cut the damaged parts!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 앞머리는 눈썹 아래까지 오게 해주세요!
content.translation: Please make the bangs come down to below the eyebrows!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 지금 이 정도로 딱 좋아요!
content.translation: It's perfect just like this right now!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 미용실에 간다면, 불안해하지 말고 웃으면서 이 문장을 말해 보세요.
content.translation: Everyone, if you go to a hair salon today, don't be anxious and say this sentence with a smile.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: "너무 짧지 않게 조금만 잘라주세요!"
content.translation: Don't cut it too short, just a little!

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 건강을 위해서 꾸준히 운동을 유지하고 있어요. (I'm consistently maintaining exercise for my health.)
치마를 너무 짧지 않게 수선해 주세요. (Please repair the skirt so it's not too short.)

vocabulary.meaning: To be damaged / To be spoiled
vocabulary.example: 머릿결이 많이 상해서 트리트먼트가 필요해요. (My hair is very damaged, so I need a treatment.)
그는 눈썹이 진해서 인상이 아주 강해 보여요. (He has thick eyebrows, so his impression looks very strong.)
대화할 때는 서로의 예의라는 선을 지키는 게 중요해요. (When talking, it's important to keep the line called mutual politeness.)
소중한 내 머리카락을 사수하기 위해 미용사님께 부탁했어요. (I asked the stylist to protect my precious hair.)
